subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the earth! Forsake that which ye possess, for He hath come with manifest sovereignty. Naught shall profit you this day save [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل الارض دعوا ما عندکم انه قد اتی بسلطان مبین لاینفعکم الیوم شیء الا
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @proclamation to the people of the world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
